mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO doc_asset_ref (document_id, asset_id, ref_scope, created_at) VALUES
(#{ref.documentId}, #{ref.assetId}, #{ref.refScope}, #{ref.createdAt})
INSERT INTO doc_asset_ref (document_id, asset_id, ref_scope, created_at) SELECT document_id, asset_id, 'PUBLISHED', NOW() FROM doc_asset_ref WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND ref_scope = 'DRAFT'
